description: Rideshare demand predictor — canonical feature registry

feature_views.name: trip_temporal_features
feature_views.description: Features derived from pickup timestamp. Available at request time — no future data required.

features.name: hour
features.description: Hour of pickup (0-23). Captures time-of-day demand cycles.

features.name: day_of_week
features.description: Day of week (0=Monday, 6=Sunday). Captures weekly demand patterns.

features.name: is_weekend
features.description: 1 if Saturday or Sunday, 0 otherwise. Weekends have structurally different demand.

features.name: is_rush_hour
features.description: 1 if 7-9am or 5-7pm, 0 otherwise. Rush hour trips take significantly longer.

feature_views.name: trip_spatial_features
feature_views.description: Features derived from GPS coordinates. Available at request time.

features.name: distance_km
features.description: Haversine distance between pickup and dropoff in km. Strongest predictor of duration.

feature_views.name: trip_demand_features
feature_views.description: Point-in-time demand aggregations. CRITICAL: must use only past data relative to each trip timestamp.

features.name: avg_duration_same_hour_last7days
features.description: Average trip duration for same hour-of-day over previous 7 days. Point-in-time: only trips before this timestamp.
features.leakage_risk: HIGH if computed globally — must use point-in-time join

features.name: trip_count_last_1h
features.description: Number of trips started in the 60 minutes before this trip. Proxy for demand level.
features.leakage_risk: HIGH if computed globally — must use point-in-time join

feature_services.name: rideshare_training_features
feature_services.description: Full feature set for model training. Includes point-in-time demand features.

feature_services.name: rideshare_inference_features
feature_services.description: Features available at inference time. Excludes demand aggregations that require historical lookback.
